market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Hot Tub Annexe for 4 – Outdoor Cinema Nights
Cozy 2‑Bedroom Retreat with Hot Tub & Cinema
Annexe for Two – Private Hot Tub & Cinema
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your private, cosy annexe – an entire home perfectly designed for up to four guests. Rated 4.92 from 110 glowing reviews, this space blends comfort with unforgettable entertainment. The bedroom area comfortably sleeps two, while a stylish sofa bed in the living area provides space for two more, making it ideal for couples, small families, or friends.

Step outside to your own outdoor cinema under the stars and a soothing hot‑tub that promises relaxing evenings after a day of exploring. Whether you’re watching a favourite film or simply soaking under the night sky, the experience is uniquely yours.

Inside, the fully equipped kitchen lets you whip up meals, and a modern bathroom offers fresh towels and essential toiletries. High‑speed Wi‑Fi keeps you connected, and a dedicated parking space ensures hassle‑free arrivals.

At £151.9 per night, you’re enjoying a rate that sits just below the city median (£154.6) while delivering a 4.92 rating that outperforms many listings. With 45 open nights in the next 90 days, there’s plenty of opportunity to fill your calendar and capture the revenue you deserve. Book now and experience the perfect blend of comfort, entertainment, and privacy that only this annexe can provide.
top_amenity_gaps: Fully equipped kitchen (coffee maker, dishwasher, cookware)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a striking night‑time shot of the hot tub with the outdoor cinema screen glowing in the background as the cover photo; it showcases the listing’s most unique, high‑value amenities first.
key_diagnosis: Title optimisation: your current title is 46 characters but misses high‑search keywords; a stronger, SEO‑focused title can boost click‑through rates.
Add missing high‑value amenities (parking, Wi‑Fi, full kitchen equipment) to the amenities list – currently none are displayed, scoring 2/10.

Upload a complete set of professional photos covering bedroom, living area, kitchen, bathroom, and the hot‑tub/outdoor cinema, and set the hot‑tub evening scene as the cover; unknown photo count is hurting visual appeal.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 45 open nights this quarter, representing roughly £6,835 of untapped revenue at your current nightly rate.
